mainEntity.name: Does voice search SEO work differently in big cities like Los Angeles or Austin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, local context matters because voice searches often include city names, neighborhoods, and “near me” phrasing. For businesses in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, location pages and neighborhood references can help match how people speak.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, city competition is usually tougher, so local specificity matters more. Neighborhood names, service-area pages, and accurate profile data can help you stand out in larger markets.
